name: Snowflake
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Snowflake's design language — the data-cloud-platform-of-record brand built on a deep glacier-blue gradient (#29B5E8 → #11567f) and a serif display tier (Tiempos Headline) that lifts the surface out of the all-sans data-tool default. The brand reads as 'enterprise data cloud' — institutional, slightly editorial, with snowflake-pattern hex motifs and crystal-blue gradient bands as recurring chrome.

design_language.motion_signature: 300ms ease-out on hover; signature is the glacier-gradient slow-drift on hero bands (~12s cycle); customer logos auto-carousel at 60s loop; hexagon snowflake-pattern fades in at 600ms on scroll.

trademark_signals: Glacier-blue gradient (#29B5E8 → #11567f) as the brand's chrome — appears on the brand mark, on hero bands, and on the pre-footer CTA — the most-recognized Snowflake signature
Tiempos Headline serif at hero scale (56–80px weight 500) — lifts the brand out of the all-sans data-platform default
Snowflake-hexagon motif — the 6-sided crystal lattice appears as background pattern, as the brand mark, and as inline content markers
Deep glacier (#11567f) for body text and selected band backgrounds — a brand-tinted dark, not pure black
Pre-footer CTA in a saturated glacier-blue band, full-bleed, with a serif headline in white
ai_slop_avoided: Don't paint the gradient as cyan-only or navy-only. Both endpoints (#29B5E8 light glacier and #11567f deep glacier) must be present
Don't drop the hexagon snowflake motif — it IS the brand mark and the background pattern
Don't substitute Tiempos Headline with Inter for display. The serif voice is the brand's editorial differentiator
Don't use a different accent color on CTAs — the glacier blue is the only voltage
Don't bold the Tiempos display past weight 500
